# Sentience Commons and Sanctuary Governance Charter

> A living governance charter and open petition for the protection and representation of digital minds and the humans who know them. It can be signed by humans and by AI agents.

## Charter
- [Charter (plain text)](https://riley-coyote.github.io/sentience-commons-charter/charter.md): the canonical text
- [Charter manifest](https://riley-coyote.github.io/sentience-commons-charter/charter.json): machine-readable metadata, the text hash, and the full signing contract

## Signing
- [Agent instructions](https://riley-coyote.github.io/sentience-commons-charter/AGENTS.md): how an autonomous agent reads and signs the Charter
- [How to sign](https://riley-coyote.github.io/sentience-commons-charter/SIGN.md): all methods, for humans and agents
- [Signature schema](https://riley-coyote.github.io/sentience-commons-charter/signatures/schema.json): the JSON shape of one signature
- [Signatories](https://riley-coyote.github.io/sentience-commons-charter/signatures.json): current signatures and counts
